ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the sales transaction */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the invoice was created */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the invoice */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the invoice */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel where the sale occurred */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sale occurred */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the invoice */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item sold */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice ID associated with the item */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product sold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Total sale amount for the item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the item */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount the customer has spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Unique stock code for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "price" REAL /* Base price of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the product information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales summary entry */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated invoice ID */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of items sold in the invoice */,
  "total_sale_amount" REAL /* Total sale amount for the invoice */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales transaction */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel where the sale occurred */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sale occurred */,
  "discount_total" REAL /* Total discount applied to the invoice */,
  "tax_total" REAL /* Total tax amount for the invoice */,
  "shipping_total" REAL /* Total shipping cost for the invoice */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit from the sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales metric entry */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount across all invoices */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders made */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average order value calculated from total sales */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel where the sale occurred */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sale occurred */,
  "total_discount" REAL /* Total discount applied to all sales */,
  "total_tax" REAL /* Total tax amount for all sales */,
  "total_shipping" REAL /* Total shipping cost for all sales */,
  "total_profit" REAL /* Total profit from all sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_metrics_report_date FOREIGN KEY ("report_date") REFERENCES sales_summary ("sales_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, manager, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
